basic_details.job_title: TMC HBCH Varanasi Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Resident / Medical Officer post
basic_details.organization_name: Tata Memorial Centre Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital (TMC HBCH Varanasi) Senior Resident / Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 28 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TMC HBCH Varanasi Senior Resident / Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Physically Handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. / D.N.B. Pediatric or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by NMC, M.B.B.S. degree recognized by NMC
qualification.details: For Senior Resident: M.D. / D.N.B. Pediatric or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by NMC. For Medical Officer: M.B.B.S. degree recognized by NMC.

salary_details.details: Senior Resident: Rs. 1,33,623/- per month consolidated. Medical Officer: Rs. 1,11,132/- per month consolidated.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview period is from 28th May 2026 to 15th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend within this timeframe.

faq.question: Q2. What is the maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What are the required qualifications for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: For the Senior Resident post, candidates must possess an M.D. / D.N.B. Pediatric or an equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary for the Medical Officer post is Rs. 1,11,132/-.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Tata Memorial Centre Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital, Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, 221005.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is available: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Physically Handicapped candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 2 vacancies are announced for the post of Senior Resident / Medical Officer (Pediatric Oncology).
